name_en: Top-tier original sample, code-changed chip M14209 Pink
name_cn:
Top-tier original sample, code-changed chip M14209 Pink
M46673 Light Blue M47180 Apricot Print M46288 Black M46293 Cream White M46277 Apricot M11790 Brown
This CarryAll Small Tote is crafted from Monogram Empreinte leather, showcasing the elegant style of the LV Milky Way series. Metal hardware and a removable nameplate add a sophisticated touch, while the interior pocket securely stores valuables. It can be carried by hand or worn on the shoulder for more carrying options.
24 x 12 x 29.5 cm
(Height x Width x Length)
Textured grainy calfskin
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Metal hardware
Zipper closure
Interior patch pocket
Interior zip pocket
Removable nameplate
Fits smartphone, 10-inch tablet, keys, Zippy wallet, and headphones
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 32.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 50.0 cm
